options.name: -excNetFile
options.description: Specifies the file that contains the names of hierarchical nets to exclude from buffer removal.

options.name: -footprint
options.description: Specifies the footprint of buffers to remove.

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies the hierarchical nets to include during buffer removal.

options.name: -selNetFile
options.description: Specifies the file that contains the names of hierarchical nets to include during buffer removal.
